page.content: In Fiscal Year 2024, Mastercard Inc reported Lending Platform Metrics with Total Loans of $320M and a Default Rate of 1.75%. Revenue Breakdown indicated Interest Income of $180M, Fees Income of $70M, and a Net Income of $285M.

lines.text: In Fiscal Year 2024, Mastercard Inc reported Lending Platform Metrics with Total Loans of $320M and a Default Rate of
1.75%. Revenue Breakdown indicated Interest Income of $180M, Fees Income of $70M, and a Net Income of $285M.

page.content: Operational Expenses totaled $57M, with Marketing Costs at $10M, Tech Costs at $12M, and Personnel Costs at $35M. The quarterly breakdown showed Quarter 1 with Total Loans of $50M and a Default Rate of 1.5%, generating Interest Income of $30M, Fees Income of $10M, and Total Expenses of $45M, leading to a Net Income of $55M. Quarter 2 revealed Total Loans of $70M, a Default Rate of 1.8%, Interest Income of $40M, Fees Income of $15M, Total Expenses of $63M, and a Net Income of $75M. Quarter 3 had Total Loans of $90M, a Default Rate of 2.0%, Interest Income of $50M, Fees Income of $20M, Total Expenses of $80M, and a Net Income of $95M. Quarter 4 reported Total Loans of $110M, a Default Rate of 2.2%, Interest Income of $60M, Fees Income of $25M, Total Expenses of $97M, and a Net Income of $120M. Projected growth was 20%, with a market share of 15%, a Customer Acquisition Cost of $500, an Average Loan Size of $15,000, and Total Applications Received. In the Insurtech Policy Issuance, the Health Insurance policy type issued 5,000 policies with a Premium of $12.3M, an Amount Issued of $12.3M, a Claims Ratio of 85%, and a Renewal Rate of 90%.

lines.text: Operational Expenses totaled $57M, with Marketing Costs at $10M, Tech Costs at $12M, and Personnel Costs at $35M. The
quarterly breakdown showed Quarter 1 with Total Loans of $50M and a Default Rate of 1.5%, generating Interest Income of
$30M, Fees Income of $10M, and Total Expenses of $45M, leading to a Net Income of $55M. Quarter 2 revealed Total Loans
of $70M, a Default Rate of 1.8%, Interest Income of $40M, Fees Income of $15M, Total Expenses of $63M, and a Net Income
of $75M. Quarter 3 had Total Loans of $90M, a Default Rate of 2.0%, Interest Income of $50M, Fees Income of $20M, Total
Expenses of $80M, and a Net Income of $95M. Quarter 4 reported Total Loans of $110M, a Default Rate of 2.2%, Interest
Income of $60M, Fees Income of $25M, Total Expenses of $97M, and a Net Income of $120M. Projected growth was 20%,
with a market share of 15%, a Customer Acquisition Cost of $500, an Average Loan Size of $15,000, and Total Applications
Received. In the Insurtech Policy Issuance, the Health Insurance policy type issued 5,000 policies with a Premium of $12.3M,
an Amount Issued of $12.3M, a Claims Ratio of 85%, and a Renewal Rate of 90%.

page.content: The Auto Insurance policy type issued 3,500 policies with a Premium of $8.5M, an Amount Issued of $8.5M, a Claims Ratio of 78%, and a Renewal Rate of 88%. The Travel Insurance policy type issued 2,200 policies with a Premium of $4.7M, an Amount Issued of $4.7M, a Claims Ratio of 82%, and a Renewal Rate of 85%. The Home Insurance policy type issued 4,000 policies with a Premium of $9.8M, an Amount Issued of $9.8M, a Claims Ratio of 80%, and a Renewal Rate of 87%. The Total Policies amounted to 14,700, with a Financial Overview of $35.3M, a Claims Ratio of 81%, and an Average Renewal Rate.
